name: Voice Hello (First-Win)
description: Minimal voice first-win pipeline: check TTS, speak a greeting.
_migration_note: Removed the wait_for_user step: it called system:wait_for, an event/webhook-based wait that was never implemented anywhere in the codebase (system:wait only supports a fixed duration_ms sleep), and its output was never consumed downstream anyway — the greeting text below is static. Re-add a real wait step here only once an actual speech-triggered wake mechanism exists.

params.text: こんにちは。Kyberion が聴いています。
